S.FORM: Jerryd Bayless hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'aras mari' tay suruw / p'agal tins' tay suruw. kawas tay 1988, ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 8, Jerryd Bayless, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *errj* Œ≤ajles~…ïs~…ï ƒßja î…£a nŒ≤a p…£naw î mari î mis~…ïuw qanij, qutux s~…ïa p îaras~…ï mari î taj s~…ïuruw / p îa…£al tins~…ï î taj s~…ïuruw. kawas~…ï taj ****, rjax s~…ïa taj ** nqu taj *, *errj* Œ≤ajles~…ïs~…ï, s~…ïquliq na p îunro. ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* national Œ≤as~…ïketŒ≤all as~…ïs~…ïo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ï
S.FORM: Jerryd Bayless hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'aras mari' tay suruw / p'agal tins' tay suruw. kawas tay 1988, ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 8, Jerryd Bayless, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *errj* Œ≤ajles~…ïs~…ï ƒßja î…£a nŒ≤a p…£naw î mari î mis~…ïuw qanij, qutux s~…ïa p îaras~…ï mari î taj s~…ïuruw / p îa…£al tins~…ï î taj s~…ïuruw. kawas~…ï taj ****, rjax s~…ïa taj ** nqu taj *, *errj* Œ≤ajles~…ïs~…ï, s~…ïquliq na p îunro. ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* national Œ≤as~…ïketŒ≤all as~…ïs~…ïo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ï
